descriptions.english: At the end of battle, the front friendly unit on each floor permanently gains +[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health].
descriptions.french: À la fin de la bataille, l'allié en 1re ligne à chaque niveau gagne définitivement +[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health].
descriptions.german: Am Ende des Kampfes erhält die vordere verbündete Einheit auf jeder Ebene permanent +[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health].
descriptions.russian: В конце боя передние союзники с каждого этажа навсегда получают +[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health].
descriptions.portuguese: No fim da batalha, a unidade aliada na frente em cada andar recebe permanentemente +[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health].
descriptions.chinese: 战斗结束时，每层的前排友方单位永久获得 +[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health]。
descriptions.spanish: Al final de cada batalla, la primera unidad aliada de cada piso añade permanentemente +[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health].
descriptions.chinese_traditional: 在戰鬥結束時，每個樓層前排的友方單位永久獲得+[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health]。
descriptions.korean: 전투가 끝날 때, 각 층의 전열에 있는 아군 유닛은 영구적으로 +[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health]을 획득합니다.
descriptions.japanese: バトルの終了時に、各フロアの前列の味方ユニットが+[effect0.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health]を永続的に得る。

lore_tooltips.english: A ring that belonged to Finna the Doomed. May it bring greater luck to whoever now wears it.
lore_tooltips.french: Un anneau ayant appartenu à Finna la Condamnée. Puisse-t-il porter chance à son porteur aujourd'hui.
lore_tooltips.german: Ein Ring, der Finna der Verdammten gehörte. Möge er seinem jetzigen Träger mehr Glück bringen.
lore_tooltips.russian: Кольцо, принадлежавшее Финне Обреченной. Оно приносит удачу новому владельцу.
lore_tooltips.portuguese: Um anel que pertenceu a Finna, a Condenada. Que ele traga mais sorte a quem quer que o use.
lore_tooltips.chinese: 这枚戒指曾属于命运已定的菲娜。愿它现在的主人能更加走运一些。
lore_tooltips.spanish: Este anillo perteneció a Finna la Condenada. Esperemos que su nuevo portador sea más afortunado.
lore_tooltips.chinese_traditional: 一枚屬於『絕命者』費納的戒指。願它能為現在的佩戴者帶來更好的運氣。
lore_tooltips.korean: 파멸자 피나가 끼던 반지. 이 반지를 낀 자에게 더 큰 행운이 깃들기를.
lore_tooltips.japanese: 絶望のフィナが所有していた指輪。今これを持つことになった者には幸運が訪れればよいのだが。

descriptions.english: Gain [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health] permanently at the end of combat.
descriptions.french: Octroie [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health] définitivement à la fin du combat.
descriptions.german: Erhalte am Ende des Kampfes permanent [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health].
descriptions.portuguese: Recebe [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health] permanentemente no final do combate.
descriptions.chinese: 在战斗结束时永久获得 [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health]。
descriptions.spanish: Obtienes [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health] permanentemente al final del combate.
descriptions.japanese: 戦闘の終了時に[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonushp] [health]を永続的に得る。
